docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY GUMORA, MICHAEL DEAN AS TO DEFENDANT COYLE, STACEY ANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-20-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
